showFiles.label: Show Files Sidebar
showFiles.description: Workspace file tree (folder tabs only). Toggle with <kbd>Cmd/Ctrl+B</kbd>.

showOutline.label: Show Outline Sidebar
showOutline.description: Document table of contents. Toggle with <kbd>Cmd/Ctrl+\</kbd>.

sidebarLayout.label: Sidebar layout
sidebarLayout.description: Folder tabs only. Split: Files and Outline on opposite sides. Combined: stacked in one panel. Beside: two adjacent panels on the same side.

swap.label: Swap sidebar sides
swap.description: Flip which side each panel lives on. Default is Files left / Outline right; on, it becomes Files right / Outline left.

autoReload.label: Auto-reload
autoReload.description: Reload file when changed on disk

reopenLastFile.label: Reopen Last File
reopenLastFile.description: Open the last viewed file on startup

confirmExternalLinks.label: Confirm External Links
confirmExternalLinks.description: Ask before opening links in browser

updates.title: Updates

check.label: Check for updates
check.description: On launch, check for a newer release and show a banner when one is available. Only the installed version is compared; no files or personal data are sent.

updates.error: Couldn't check for updates. Try again later.

spellCheck.title: Spell Check
spellCheck.label: Check spelling
spellCheck.description: Underline misspelled words while editing. Right-click a word for suggestions. Applies to edit and split modes.

keymap.label: Keymap
keymap.description: Keyboard bindings for the markdown editor. Vim adds modal editing; VSCode mirrors common VSCode shortcuts. Takes effect the next time a document enters edit or split mode.

default.title: Default (Glyph) shortcuts
default.autocomplete: in a folder workspace opens wikilink autocomplete

vim.title: Vim quick reference
vim.motions: motions; f + char to jump; / to search
vim.operators: operators with counts and text objects (diw, ci")
vim.files: File commands like :w, :q, and :wq don't apply here — Glyph autosaves, and you close a tab with the Close Tab shortcut.

vscode.title: VSCode shortcuts
vscode.moveLine: move the current line up / down
vscode.multiSelect: select the next occurrence; Cmd/Ctrl+] or [ to indent / outdent

status.error: Cannot reach the Ollama server. Check the URL and OLLAMA_ORIGINS.

pageBreaks.label: Page Breaks
pageBreaks.description: Start a new page at heading level

toc.label: Include Table of Contents
toc.description: Insert a contents page at the start

crashReports.label: Send crash reports
crashReports.description: Off by default. When on, anonymous crash reports (stack traces, OS, and app version) are sent to help fix bugs. Your files, file paths, and links are never included. Only active in production builds. See SECURITY.md for the full policy.

gfm.label: Tables & task lists
gfm.description: GitHub Flavored Markdown: tables, task lists, strikethrough, autolinks

defaultApp.title: Default app
defaultApp.label: Default Markdown app
defaultApp.description: Open Markdown files in Glyph by default.

outcome.registered: Glyph is now your default Markdown app.
outcome.openedSettings: Opened Default Apps settings. Choose Glyph for Markdown files.
outcome.guidance: In Finder, right-click a Markdown file, choose Get Info, set Open With to Glyph, then Change All.
outcome.error: Couldn't set the default app. Set it from your system settings instead.
